About the Role We are hiring Tax & Accounting Consultants at Junior, Semi Senior, and Senior levels who are capable of handling both tax compliance and financial accounting for multiple clients. This role is suited for candidates with hands-on experience in tax and accounting, who are able to manage deadlines, ensure accuracy, and work in a fast-paced professional services environment. job_description: Listed more than four days ago International Cross-border Corporate Services Associate (國際跨境企業服務專員) di PT Evershine Consulting Services Ini adalah lowongan kerja Full time Jakarta Raya ( Hibrid ) Rp 15.000.000 – Rp 20.000.000 per month Exposure to Global Clients & Cross-border Projects International Corporate Services Career Development Flexible Hybrid & AI-assisted International Working Environment Exposure to Global Clients & Cross-border Projects International Corporate Services Career Development Flexible Hybrid & AI-assisted International Working Environment Join Evershine Group and support global clients through international cross-border corporate services and business expansion projects. Join Evershine Group and support global clients through international cross-border corporate services and business expansion projects. subClassification: Layanan Bisnis & Penasihat Perusahaan Layanan Bisnis & Penasihat Perusahaan classification: Akuntansi (Akuntansi) 4 hari yang lalu 4 hari yang lalu 關於永輝集團 | About Evershine Group 永輝集團及其關係企業，透過雲端系統與跨國協作模式，為全球企業提供跨境財務會計、稅務遵循、企業設立、財務報表及國際企業服務支援。目前永輝集團服務來自全球多個國家之客戶，並協助企業拓展海外市場與國際營運。隨著印尼市場及國際業務持續成長，我們正在建立印尼跨境團隊，以支援全球客戶及印尼企業海外發展需求。我們期待建立具國際視野之印尼團隊，並培養未來參與全球跨境企業服務與海外平台發展之國際人才。 Evershine Group and its affiliated companies provide cross-border accounting, tax compliance, company incorporation, financial reporting, and international corporate support services for global businesses through cloud-based systems and international collaboration models. Currently, Evershine Group serves clients from multiple countries worldwide and supports businesses in expanding their overseas operations and international presence. As our Indonesia and international business continue to grow, we are building an Indonesia cross-border team to support both global clients and Indonesian companies expanding internationally. We aim to build an internationally-minded Indonesia team and cultivate future international talents who will participate in global cross-border corporate services and overseas platform development. 職位概要 | Position Overview 本職位不僅支援印尼客戶，也將參與全球客戶之跨境企業服務、財會、稅務及營運協調工作。錄取者將與台灣及海外團隊密切合作，接觸國際企業營運模式、跨境商業環境及全球企業服務案件。此外，本職位亦將參與協助印尼企業拓展海外市場與國際營運相關支援工作。本職位並非傳統地方行政職務，而是參與國際跨境專業服務平台發展之機會。 This role will not only support Indonesian clients, but will also participate in cross-border corporate services, accounting, tax, and operational coordination for global clients. The successful candidate will work closely with Taiwan and overseas teams while gaining exposure to international business operations, cross-border working environments, and global corporate service projects. In addition, this role may also participate in supporting Indonesian companies in their overseas expansion and international operations. This role is not a traditional local administrative position, but an opportunity to participate in a growing international cross-border professional service platform. 工作模式與工作環境 | Working Model &
